visual_description: Three silhouetted figures walk through a crumbling stone archway into a dimly lit passage, with debris scattered on the floor. A close-up shows a young man with round glasses and short dark hair, his expression serious as he looks directly ahead. The scene shifts to a vast, dark hall lined with towering shelves and hanging objects, barely illuminated.
audio_description: The audio is not clearly audible.
